heroDescription: Discover sustainable events, workshops, and eco-friendly products near you. Grow community, learn green skills, and support a healthier future.
aboutDescription: Urban Harvest Hub connects people with eco-friendly events, workshops, and products that make sustainable living easy and inspiring.
card1Desc: Browse local gatherings that teach green living, gardening, and recycling.
card2Desc: Learn from experts with hands-on classes for every skill level.
card3Desc: Support sustainable makers with thoughtfully selected items.
